summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's title bid as the Scuderia seeks to capitalize on his Spanish victory and challenge the early-season dominance. McLaren's consistency against Red Bull's recent resurgence creates a three-way tactical puzzle, with tire strategy and qualifying trim decisions potentially reshuffling the grid hierarchy. A strong result here could crystallize whether Hamilton's impact transforms Ferrari into genuine championship contenders or merely offers a temporary morale boost in what remains a competitive fight.
